summary: AI Clinical Support Features Testing Complete - All 19 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified with all 4 tabs working correctly. Fixed critical bug in backend where AI endpoints were using wrong field name for client lookup.
seed_data_creation: Test resources created with TEST_ prefix during testing, cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: AI Clinical Support features fully tested and working. Bug fix applied to backend for client lookup in AI endpoints.

bug_fixes_applied.issue: AI endpoints (suggest-assessments, generate-protocol, generate-homework, resource assign) were using 'id' field to lookup clients in client_profiles collection, but the collection uses 'user_id' field
bug_fixes_applied.root_cause: client_profiles collection stores user_id as the reference to users collection, not id
bug_fixes_applied.fix: Changed all AI endpoint queries from {'id': client_id} to {'user_id': client_id} in client_profiles.find_one() calls

ai_assessment_suggestions.notes: Returns PHQ-9, GAD-7, etc. based on symptoms. AI analysis summary included.

ai_protocol_builder.notes: Generates evidence-based treatment protocols with session plans, interventions, homework

ai_homework_generator.notes: Generates therapeutic homework with exercises, instructions, rationale

resource_library.notes: Full CRUD operations working. Resource assignment to clients working.

navigation.notes: AI Clinical nav item visible in therapist dashboard sidebar

tab_navigation.notes: All 4 tabs navigate correctly within AI Clinical Support component

authentication.notes: All AI endpoints properly require authentication
